commands.review_summary:
The PR adds scoped mention-pattern allow/deny policy across global, agent, and channel/provider config, wires it through channel runtimes and Plugin SDK helpers, updates docs/generated baselines/tests, and changes package override/shrinkwrap state.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a feature PR; the remaining blockers are source-visible diff, proof, and compatibility review issues rather than a current-main bug reproduction.
